## 提交前确认 / Before Opening

- [ ] 我已阅读 [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/Darkatse/TauriTavern/blob/dev/CONTRIBUTING.md)，并确认此 PR 的目标分支符合贡献指南。
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/Darkatse/TauriTavern/blob/dev/CONTRIBUTING.md) and confirmed that this PR targets the appropriate branch.

## 变更说明 / Summary

请用自己的话说明这个 PR 解决了什么问题，以及你实际修改了哪些内容。

Please describe in your own words what problem this PR solves and what you actually changed.

## Vibe Coding / AI 辅助 / AI Assistance

如果使用了 Vibe Coding，如Codex、Claude Code、Copilot或其他 AI 辅助工具，请用自己的话说明你如何审阅和理解了这些变更。

If Vibe Coding, Codex, Claude Code, Copilot, ChatGPT, or another AI-assisted tool was used, please explain in your own words how you reviewed and understood the changes.
